meaning: 亚马尔半岛[苏联西伯利亚西北部]
examples: It is located on the Yamal Peninsula.
Gas deposits were first identified in Yamal during Soviet times.
Salekhard is the Russian town and the administrative center of the Yamal-Nenets autonomous okrug.
Russia is rapidly developing the energy-rich Yamal Peninsula, on the eastern shore of the Kara Sea.
The Yamal mammoth is expected to be transferred to Jikei University in Tokyo, Japan, later this year.
